data.title: Little Tikes Tractor & Cart, Foot-to-Floor Ride-On, for Boys and Girls Ages 1-5 Years

features: LITTLE FARMERS – This Tractor & Cart set is a must-have for little farmers on the go. With the tractor’s realistic features and foot-to-floor design
kids can enjoy imaginative play while developing large motor skills.
ATTACHABLE CART – Includes an easy-to-attach cart that is perfect for carrying a child’s items.
REALISTIC DESIGN – Features a working steering wheel and horn.
DURABILITY – Tractor tires are high-quality and durable to last rugged outdoor play.
COMFORTABLE SEATING – The tractor’s seat is made spacious to fit children as they grow.
EASY ASSEMBLY – Easy one-time adult assembly required.
ACTIVE PLAY – This tractor set makes an ideal gift for kids ages 1-5 years.

Sections.Title: Highlights:
Texts: Comes complete with an attached wagon

John Deere helps your child feel like part of the hauling action with this Pedal Tractor and Wagon ride-on toy set. This rugged ride-on features traditional John Deere green and yellow colors for an authentic look kids will love. The pedal powered ride-on includes an accessory wagon for all of your child's outdoor hauling needs. From toddlers to preschool, your boy or girl will love getting outside to enjoy creative play with the John Deere Pedal Tractor and Wagon!

John Deere fans of all ages will enjoy this selection of farm and off-road toys! These toys combine John Deere styling with durable design and super cool features. From infant to established collector- there’s something for everyone!

Layout_Blocks.Text: Comes complete with an attached wagon

John Deere helps your child feel like part of the hauling action with this Pedal Tractor and Wagon ride-on toy set. This rugged ride-on features traditional John Deere green and yellow colors for an authentic look kids will love. The pedal powered ride-on includes an accessory wagon for all of your child's outdoor hauling needs. From toddlers to preschool, your boy or girl will love getting outside to enjoy creative play with the John Deere Pedal Tractor and Wagon!

John Deere fans of all ages will enjoy this selection of farm and off-road toys! These toys combine John Deere styling with durable design and super cool features. From infant to established collector- there’s something for everyone!

relatedProducts.Product_Description: Product Description   John Deere helps your child feel like part of the hauling action with this Pedal Tractor and Wagon ride-on toy set. This rugged ride-on features traditional John Deere green and yellow colors for an authentic look kids will love. The pedal powered ride-on includes an accessory wagon where they can put their farm tools, dolls, action figures, or play food to feel like their farming role models! The pull-along wagon is perfect for all of your child's outdoor hauling needs. This John Deere ride on is a fantastic way to get your toddlers out in the sun and interested in the classic John Deere style. From toddlers to preschool, your boy or girl will love getting outside to enjoy creative play by creating a new adventure every day and “helping” with the day’s farming/yard work outdoors. Encourage their imaginations and get ready for days filled with hauling-action fun! This tractor toy tricycle and wagon attachment have a weight limit of 60 lbs. and are great gifts for kids ages 18 months and up.   From the Manufacturer   This tractor and wagon set is where John Deere meets child sized chores. Features traditional John Deere green and yellow deco. Pedal action with accessory wagon for hauling.
